AdminEnabledByDefaultDesc: Enable Home Screen Sections by default for all users?
AdminAllowUserOverrideDesc: Can users enable/disable this plugin for their own view?
AdminUpcomingShowsDesc: How far in the future should we look for upcoming episodes?
AdminUpcomingMoviesDesc: How far in the future should we look for upcoming movies?
AdminUpcomingMusicDesc: How far in the future should we look for upcoming music releases?
AdminUpcomingBooksDesc: How far in the future should we look for upcoming book releases?
AdminLazyLoadSectionsLabel: Number of sections to load per page
AdminLazyLoadSectionsDesc: The number of sections that should be loaded per page.
AdminSonarrUrlDesc: Complete URL for Sonarr to use for upcoming shows sections.
AdminRadarrUrlDesc: Complete URL for Radarr to use for upcoming movies sections.
AdminRadarrReleaseTypesDesc: Which release types should be considered for upcoming movies? At least one must be selected.
AdminLidarrUrlDesc: Complete URL for Lidarr to use for upcoming music sections.
AdminReadarrUrlDesc: Complete URL for Readarr to use for upcoming books sections.
AdminLibreTranslateUrlDesc: URL for LibreTranslate instance to use for translations.
AdminJellyseerrInternalUrlDesc: Internal URL for Jellyseerr to use for API requests from the plugin backend.
AdminJellyseerrExternalUrlDesc: External URL for Jellyseerr links in the frontend. Leave empty to use the internal URL.
AdminDiscoverLanguageFilterDesc: Preferred languages to filter for Discover section. (comma delimited)
AdminLibraryDesc: Select the specific library to use for navigation. Lists all underlying library folders (not grouped views).
AdminRequiresRestart: Requires Jellyfin restart to take effect.
AdminCacheTimeoutDesc: How long browsers should cache plugin resources (default: 86400 = 24 hours). Set to 0 to disable caching.
AdminMaxImageCacheEntriesDesc: Maximum number of images to cache (default: 10000). Higher values use more memory but reduce re-downloads.
AdminMaxImageWidthDesc: Maximum width for cached images in pixels (default: 600). Images larger than this will be resized to save storage and bandwidth.
AdminImageJpegQualityDesc: JPEG compression quality for cached images (default: 85). Higher percentage means better quality but larger files.
AdminOverrideStreamyfinHomeDesc: Should requests for the Streamyfin config overwrite the home section with a Home Screen Sections generation.
AdminExperimental: Please Note: This functionality behind this setting is currently highly experimental and more work is likely needed before this is finalised.
AdminDeveloperModeDesc: Disable browser caching for plugin resources during development.
AdminCacheBustFailed: Failed to bust static assets cache
AdminCacheBustTransformNotFound: Static assets cache busted - file-transformation plugin not found or plugin not registered
AdminCacheBustTransformFailed: Static assets cache busted - file-transformation cache failed (check console)
AdminCacheBustMixed: Cache bust completed with mixed results (check console)
AdminStaticCacheDesc: Clears browser cache for CSS/JS files only.
AdminAllCachesDesc: Clears both static assets and index.html transformation cache.
AdminOrderDesc: Sets the display order for this section in Jellyfin. Lower numbers appear first.
AdminOrderNote: Sections with the same number are shown in random order among themselves
AdminUserOverrideDesc: Let the user override this section
AdminLowerLimitDesc: The minimum number of times this section should appear
AdminUpperLimitDesc: The maximum number of times this section can appear
AdminViewModeDesc: Defines the card layout used when displaying results.
AdminViewModeNote: If disabled, the section only supports the displayed layout.
AdminEnableModularHome: Enable "Modular Home". This will change your home screen into a more dynamic screen with options from other plugins to be able to contribute into what you see and are recommended.
AdminSettingsUpdated: Settings have been updated, reloading page in 2 seconds.
AdminReleaseTypeRequired: At least one release type must be selected for upcoming movies.
